name: QA 1946
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1946

Exercise the NVIDIA GPU PMDA, basic fetch testing - with QA nvidia library

see qa/744 for test with no nvidia library and qa/1944 for a related test



Copyright (c) 2014-2015 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2004-container reproduce
